text.title: On-Call Handoff Protocol Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when oncall-handoff-protocol is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Incoming engineer pages 90 min in for a recurring issue they didn't know about.
antipattern.reason: Open follow-up item was not in handoff.
antipattern.note: Fix: Mandate follow-up section; CI block: handoff lacking followups field rejected.

antipattern.description: Outgoing engineer skips handoff because 'nothing happened'.
antipattern.note: Fix: Norm one-line empty-shift handoff; missing handoff escalates.

antipattern.description: Engineer hands off while exhausted; misses a critical detail.
antipattern.note: Fix: Add fatigue_signal field; high triggers ops-lead review.
